name: Flag Ship Acquisition Corp
summary: PART I General Flag Ship Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company incorporated on May14, 2018 as a Cayman Islands exempted company and incorporated for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The registration statement for our initial public offering was declared effective by the Securities and Exchange Commission on June17, 2024. We completed our initial public offer...
